intentAndPurpose.intent: Contentless status dot ("unread" affordance). Five sizes. `appearance` inherits from a slot-owning parent (Badge/Button) when unset, else primary; fills from the bold surface. Hidden from assistive tech unless `aria-label` is set. Use CounterBadge for a count.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role. When unset, inherits from a slot-owning parent (Badge/Button), else 'primary'.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: When set, exposes role="image"; otherwise the dot is decorative (hidden).

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only — appearance + the parent <Surface> drive the fill. — [warn] Don't paint the dot; use `appearance`. In a parent slot, leave appearance unset to inherit.

appearance.description: Multi-accent role. When unset, inherits from a slot-owning parent (Badge/Button), else 'primary'.

aria-label.description: When set, exposes role="image"; otherwise the dot is decorative (hidden).

backgroundColor.x-jds-suggestion: Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

style.description: Layout style only — appearance + the parent <Surface> drive the fill.
style.x-jds-suggestion: Don't paint the dot; use `appearance`. In a parent slot, leave appearance unset to inherit.
